category_sources: Official wiki at https://wiki.nikhef.nl/grid/FetchCRL3 says fetch-crl retrieves CRLs for installed trust anchors.
source_facts.description says it retrieves certificate revocation lists.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository at https://github.com/dlgroep/fetch-crl uses the project name fetch-crl.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/dlgroep/fetch-crl includes usage and configuration notes.
Official wiki at https://wiki.nikhef.nl/grid/FetchCRL3 documents configuration options and source management.
repo_sources: Official wiki at https://wiki.nikhef.nl/grid/FetchCRL3 lists https://github.com/dlgroep/fetch-crl as the source code repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official wiki source-code-repository section.
tags_sources: Official wiki and README say fetch-crl installs CRLs for OpenSSL, NSS, and related tools.
source_facts.description identifies certificate revocation list retrieval.
